MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rahsam Abram, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Freedom West Homes Inc.
David Briggs representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Sylvia Huey is present.
Allison Kidd representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
